createdAt.description: When the user profile was created.

ChatLog.title: ChatLog
ChatLog.description: Saved history logs of chats with MapMates AI.

question.description: The query asked by the user.

response.description: The reply spoken or written by the AI.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the message was processed.

userId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the sender or guest.

userName.description: The display name of the feedback sender.

userLocation.description: The approximate location context of the feedback.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the feedback was submitted.

AnalyticsSession.title: AnalyticsSession
AnalyticsSession.description: Google Analytics and Microsoft Clarity-like user session event and interaction telemetry.

userId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the sender or guest.

userName.description: The display name of the user.

userEmail.description: The email of the user if logged in.

deviceInfo.description: Information about the user's browser viewport and user agent.

rageClicks.description: Number of rapid consecutive clicked interactions on same element.

timeSpentSeconds.description: Total time spent during session in seconds.

clickedItems.description: Serialized JSON of specific items/features and click detail logs.

mostUsedFeatures.description: Serialized representation of top components or features interacted with.

Idea.title: Idea
Idea.description: User-submitted ideas for MapMates and direct contact queries to Faizan.

userId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the sender or guest.

userName.description: The display name of the feedback sender.

userEmail.description: The email of the user if logged in.

ideaText.description: The content details of the user idea or message.

category.description: The classified category (e.g. idea or contact).

aiAnalysis.description: Verification and analysis feedback from the AI Moderator.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the idea was validated and posted.

/users/{userId}/chats/{chatId}.description: Private, secure history logs of chats for the user.

/analytics/{sessionId}.description: Secure Google Analytics and Microsoft Clarity session logs.

/ideas/{ideaId}.description: Moderated user ideas and Faizan contact submissions.
